sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ فَادِي تَعَلُّمَ الرُّكُوبِ عَلَى الدَّرَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Fadi je htio naučiti voziti bicikl.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Fadi wanted to learn to ride a bicycle.

sentences.translation: Puno je pokušavao i pao je mnogo puta.
sentences.translationEn: He tried many times and fell many times.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَتِ الأُمُّ بِجَانِبِهِ وَقَالَتْ: «أَنَا وَاثِقَةٌ مِنْكَ».
sentences.translation: Majka je stala pored njega i rekla: «Vjerujem u tebe».
sentences.translationEn: His mother stood beside him and said: «I believe in you».

sentences.arabic: رَكَضَ فَادِي وَرَكِبَ الدَّرَّاجَةَ بِمُفْرَدِهِ أَخِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Fadi je potrčao i konačno sam vozio bicikl.
sentences.translationEn: Fadi ran and finally rode the bicycle alone.
